title: Low Alex's Caves Shield
description: Low shield for the Alex's Cave mod
body:
# Low Alex's Caves Shield

The shield appears smaller on the screen when it is held in the first or second hand, but remains the same size from every aspect for the other players or if other players are holding it.


- Without the Pack :
![Without the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b0d846b3a60384f9e907d826077da59b3337d82.webp)
- With the Pack :
![with the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07981da046b50482cf48789e916ce928cee1ca6e.webp)
